publishedAbstract: - Running a Ceph benchmark using `ceph tell osd bench` reports inaccurate metrics, given the drives' manufacturer specifications.- We have seen that if the cache is inside the OSDs, it will have inaccurate osd bench output from `ceph tell osd bench`.
publishedTitle: `ceph tell osd.x bench `command reports inaccurate metrics if have cache in OSDs.
